summary: Iteration 263 - Sovereign Council (10 Members) Testing Complete. Backend: 27/28 tests passed (1 skipped - no owned utilities). Frontend: All UI components verified including 10 member cards (5 advisors + 5 faculty), stats bar, utility tool bars with 10% discount pricing, chat view with tier-based knowledge depth, and AI responses with cross-member bridging.
critical_code_review_comments: sovereigns.py: COUNCIL dict correctly defines 10 members (5 advisors + 5 faculty) with proper role_type field
sovereigns.py: UTILITY_TOOLS dict defines 5 tools with correct teacher_id mappings to faculty members
sovereigns.py: UTILITY_DISCOUNT_RATE = 0.10 (10% Universal Subsidy) correctly applied
sovereigns.py: TIER_KNOWLEDGE_DEPTH provides 4 levels (discovery=foundational, resonance=intermediate, sovereign=advanced, architect=unrestricted)
sovereigns.py: build_system_prompt() includes utility context for faculty members
sovereigns.py: /list endpoint returns utility object for faculty (null for advisors) with base_price, discounted_price, discount_pct=10, owned, native_access
sovereigns.py: /purchase-utility endpoint checks already_owned and native_access before charging
sovereigns.py: /utilities endpoint returns all 5 tools with ownership status
SovereignAdvisors.js: CouncilCard component shows Crown icon for advisors, GraduationCap for faculty
SovereignAdvisors.js: Utility tool bar shows strikethrough base_price and discounted_price with -10% badge
SovereignAdvisors.js: Stats bar shows Tier, Dust, Utilities (x/5), and Subsidy (10%)
SovereignAdvisors.js: Protocol info section describes 10% subsidy and 30% Failure Charge
SovereignAdvisors.js: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with ~21 Dust balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 263 verified the 10-member Sovereign Council system: (1) GET /api/sovereigns/list returns all 10 members (5 advisors + 5 faculty) with correct structure. (2) Advisors have utility=null, faculty have utility objects with id, name, description, base_price, discounted_price, discount_pct=10, owned, native_access. (3) POST /api/sovereigns/purchase-utility handles invalid tool (400), insufficient dust (402), already owned, and native access cases. (4) GET /api/sovereigns/utilities returns all 5 tools with ownership status. (5) POST /api/sovereigns/purchase-session works for all 10 members. (6) POST /api/sovereigns/chat returns AI response with tier-based knowledge depth (discovery=foundational). (7) GET/DELETE /api/sovereigns/history/{id} works for all 10 members. (8) Frontend: /sovereigns shows 'The Sovereign Council' title with 10 member cards. (9) Stats bar shows Tier (Seeker), Dust (21), Utilities (0/5), Subsidy (10%). (10) Advisor cards show Crown icon, Faculty cards show GraduationCap icon. (11) Faculty cards show utility tool bar with strikethrough original price and discounted price. (12) Chat view shows member name, backstory, and knowledge tier depth label. (13) AI responses include cross-member bridging recommendations (e.g., [BRIDGE:The Principal Economist]). (14) Protocol info section at bottom describes 10% subsidy and 30% Failure Charge. (15) All data-testids present: council-card-{id}, council-select-{id}, council-title, council-stats, protocol-info, language-indicator, buy-utility-{id}, council-chat-view, chat-input, send-btn, back-to-list-btn, clear-history-btn, chat-msg-user, chat-msg-assistant.
